name: Bad Parenting (Offline)
description: Bad Parenting is a horror video game made by a Unity Engine. This extension is developed to output the game on your browser. Just activate the extension, open github.com/ianCVu/BadParenting-Browser/blob/main/output and it should run the game. If any problems occur with the frame play then open github.com/ianCVu/BadParenting-Browser/issues and report it to us
